summary: Frontend-only testing of the new Share Card Generator feature on /app. Verified ShareCardDialog flow end-to-end: opens from ShareDialog via share-open-card button (visible even when not signed in), renders 1200x630 blob preview, all 4 action buttons (download/copy/tweet/linkedin) enabled once blob ready, tweet/linkedin intents invoke window.open with correct URLs, copy doesn't crash, Escape & backdrop close work, download triggers file download. Regression routes /app /intake /tools /library load without pageerrors. research-progress-share testid present in bundle (component code path exists).
critical_code_review_comments: shareCard.js uses Math.random() for speckle dots — non-deterministic output; fine for share cards but worth noting if ever snapshot-tested.
ShareCardDialog does NOT focus-trap inside the modal; keyboard users can tab out into the canvas behind. Low priority since Escape works.
Studio.jsx line 973 parses localStorage inline on every render for shareSlug — minor perf, acceptable.
buildShareCardBlob has no network timeout; if map SVG contains remote images (unusual), img.onload could hang. Consider a setTimeout reject guard.
test_credentials: Access gate password: mind-mapper67 (no auth tested; share-open-card works unauthenticated as specified)
seed_data_creation: Used the default seeded Core Concept map that Studio auto-creates on first visit.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Share card feature is fully functional. Test environment: headless Chromium required addInitScript to monkey-patch window.open to verify tweet/linkedin URLs (popups blocked in headless). Download triggers via anchor click work fine in Playwright. navigator.clipboard.write works in Playwright headless for this page — copy clicked without throwing. ResearchProgressOverlay's share button code path verified via bundle source search only (not triggered live); to test interactively, a real streaming-research run with an API key would be needed.
